name: StandardIdentifier
description: StandardIdentifier schema from TM Forum API

allOf.description: The corresponding identification of the resource in different standard, regulatory definitions. The standard specification identifier (e.g., ISO 3166-1 Alpha-2) and the corresponding value (e.g., BE) relevant to a particular resource. It is anticipated that multiple standards can provide definitions for a single entity, e.g., a country identifier can be specified in various standards (e.g., "ISO 3166-1 Alpha 2",  "ISO 3166-1 Alpha 3", "ISO 3166-1 Numeric")

value.description: The value of the resource in the corresponding standard.e.g., a country code value
